HomePage.title: Ángel Matos
HomePage.description_1: I help businesses transform complex ideas into scalable, high-performance digital products. As a Full-Stack Developer, I specialize in crafting exceptional user experiences with React (Next.js/Vite) and React Native for web and mobile platforms.
HomePage.description_2: I build robust and secure backend architectures. I design efficient APIs (REST/GraphQL) using modern environments like Node.js (Express) and enterprise ecosystems like Java with Spring Boot, backed by databases like PostgreSQL and MongoDB.
HomePage.description_3: I ensure the quality and reliability of every delivery through automated testing (Jest, Supertest, Playwright, JUnit) and CI/CD implementation with GitHub Actions, Docker, and Azure. My goal is to write clean, maintainable code that is ready to scale in the cloud.

Experience.title: Experience
Experience.timeline_description: A summary of my career and the projects I've worked on.
Experience.dga_desc_1: Development of modern web and mobile applications using the latest technologies in the JavaScript ecosystem.
Experience.dga_desc_2: Focus on creating intuitive interfaces, clean code, and scalable solutions that transform ideas into impactful digital products.
Experience.property_desc: Professional landing page for a real estate company, developed with Next.js (React 19) and TypeScript.
